creator: incin@incin.me
text:
I think we might be good here. Is there anything else I should test? 

I used curl to validate the cert was read correctly following the https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/beats/filebeat/current/configuring-ssl-logstash.html link.

Recap: I am testing the port that Dan made for me, that does work. I think all the changes Dan made to get it to work are in the 6.8.5 version you created, Greg.
